data.name: comboBoxCrystalSystem.ToolTip
data.value: Crystal system (triclinic to cubic). Selecting one constrains the editable cell parameters and lists the matching space groups.

data.name: numericBoxA.ToolTip
data.value: Unit-cell edge length a (Å). For high-symmetry systems b and c are auto-linked to a.

data.name: numericBoxB.ToolTip
data.value: Unit-cell edge length b (Å). Becomes read-only and equal to a for tetragonal, trigonal, hexagonal and cubic systems.

data.name: numericBoxC.ToolTip
data.value: Unit-cell edge length c (Å). Becomes read-only and equal to a for the cubic system.

data.name: numericBoxAlpha.ToolTip
data.value: Unit-cell angle alpha (degrees). Auto-fixed (e.g. to 90) according to the crystal system.

data.name: numericBoxBeta.ToolTip
data.value: Unit-cell angle beta (degrees). Auto-fixed to 90 for orthorhombic and higher-symmetry systems.

data.name: numericBoxGamma.ToolTip
data.value: Unit-cell angle gamma (degrees). Auto-fixed to 120 for trigonal/hexagonal, 90 for other high-symmetry systems.

data.name: listBoxSpaceGroupCandidate.ToolTip
data.value: Candidate space groups (number.sub: Hermann-Mauguin symbol). Select one or more; each selected group is searched. Multi-select supported.

data.name: textBoxInputFormula.ToolTip
data.value: Chemical formula (empirical/reduced, e.g. 'Ti O2'). Parsed to fill per-element atom counts and the formula-unit count Z.

data.name: numericUpDownZ.ToolTip
data.value: Number of formula units per unit cell, Z (minimum 1). Multiplies the formula to give the total atom count per unit cell.

data.name: textBoxFormula.ToolTip
data.value: Read-only: total atomic composition in the unit cell (formula times Z). Updates automatically when the formula or Z changes.

data.name: waveLengthControl1.ToolTip
data.value: X-ray wave source and wavelength used to convert d-spacings to angles and to compute diffraction intensities.

data.name: numericalTextBoxDspacing.ToolTip
data.value: d-spacing (Å) of a peak to add to the table via the Add Peak button.

data.name: numericalTextBoxIntensity.ToolTip
data.value: Relative diffraction intensity (rel %) of the peak to add. Intensities are normalized to the strongest peak for the R-factor.

data.name: buttonAddPeak.ToolTip
data.value: Add the entered d-spacing and intensity as a new row in the diffraction peak table.

data.name: buttonReindexPeaks.ToolTip
data.value: Recompute the hkl (Miller) indices for all peaks from the current cell and space group.

data.name: buttonTest.ToolTip
data.value: (Debug) Import peaks from clipboard tab-separated text (column 0 = d, column 4 = intensity), replacing the peak table.

data.name: dataGridViewDiffractionPeaks.ToolTip
data.value: Observed diffraction peaks. Use the Check column to include a peak in the search and the Delete button to remove a row; the Index column shows the assigned hkl.

data.name: radioButtonAngleThreshold.ToolTip
data.value: Merge reflections whose diffraction angles differ by less than the angle threshold below.

data.name: numericUpDownAngleThreshold.ToolTip
data.value: Angle threshold in degrees (0-2). Reflections closer than this in 2theta are combined into one peak.

data.name: radioButtonEnergyThreshold.ToolTip
data.value: Merge reflections by an energy threshold instead of an angle threshold (note: the energy branch may be inactive in the current code).

data.name: numericUpDownEnergyThreshold.ToolTip
data.value: Energy threshold in electron-volts (0-10) for combining peaks (effective only in energy-threshold mode).

data.name: numericUpDownRandomization.ToolTip
data.value: Probability (%) of generating a brand-new random atomic arrangement each Monte-Carlo step. The three probabilities are auto-normalized to total 100%.

data.name: numericUpDownHybridization.ToolTip
data.value: Probability (%) of the genetic-algorithm crossover that hybridizes two existing candidates. Auto-normalized with the other two to 100%.

data.name: numericUpDownShaking.ToolTip
data.value: Probability (%) of 'shaking', i.e. slightly perturbing the atomic positions of an existing candidate. Auto-normalized to total 100%.

data.name: numericUpDownIonRadiusThreshold.ToolTip
data.value: Allowance (%) on the sum of ionic radii used to reject atomic positions that overlap. Lower values reject more crowded arrangements.

data.name: numericUpDownThreadTotal.ToolTip
data.value: Number of parallel worker threads for the search (1-16). Higher values use more CPU cores.

data.name: buttonStart.ToolTip
data.value: Start a new structure search from scratch (clears previous candidates). While running it shows 'Stop!' and stops the search when clicked.

data.name: buttonResume.ToolTip
data.value: Resume the search using the current candidate list as the starting population, rather than clearing it.

data.name: dataGridView2.ToolTip
data.value: Found structure candidates sorted by R-factor. Residual = R; Info lists space group, Wyckoff sites and fractional coordinates. Click a row to send it to the Crystal form and copy it to the clipboard.

data.name: graphControl1.ToolTip
data.value: Plot of the R-factor convergence during the search.

data.name: numericTexBox.SharedToolTip
data.value: Number of atoms of this element in the unit cell. Editing any box recomputes the chemical formula and the formula-unit count Z. The boxes are laid out as a periodic table.
